# Shuvo

> Md Iqbal Hossain Shuvo, known professionally as Shuvo and online as isuvo, is an Engineering Lead, AI SaaS Architect, software architect, and full-stack engineer based in Sherbrooke, Quebec, Canada. He builds agentic systems, business workflow automation platforms, secure cloud-native software, and AI-enabled products.

## Professional Roles

- Engineering Lead
- AI SaaS Architect
- AI Systems Architect
- Senior Systems Developer
- Senior Software Developer
- Software Developer
- Full-Stack Engineer
- Software Architect
- Platform Engineer
- AI Systems Engineer
- Cloud-Native Engineer
- DevSecOps Engineer
- Technical Lead
- Software Engineering Lead

## Core Expertise

- Agentic AI systems and workflow orchestration
- AI SaaS architecture and product engineering
- Business process and operational automation
- Full-stack software engineering
- Software and platform architecture
- Distributed systems and microservices
- Cloud-native architecture and delivery
- Platform engineering
- DevSecOps and secure software delivery
- Software security and vulnerability analysis
- Graph neural networks for program analysis
- Causal and explainable AI
- Engineering leadership
- Product-to-platform execution

## Profile

- [Homepage](https://ixuvo.com/): Professional profile, experience, expertise, research, and selected work.
- [Blog](https://ixuvo.com/blog): Technical writing on AI systems, software architecture, security, automation, cloud-native platforms, and engineering.
- [Resume](https://ixuvo.com/isuvo-resume.pdf): Professional experience, technical skills, education, and engineering background.

## Selected Technical Writing

- [Analyzing Bun's Rapid AI-Driven Rewrite from Zig to Rust and the Fallout of the '11-Day Migration'](https://ixuvo.com/blog/bun-zig-rust-ai-migration-analysis)
- [Securing the Boundary: Mitigating Zero-Day Vulnerabilities in Modern API Gateways](https://ixuvo.com/blog/securing-boundary-zero-day-api-gateways)
- [Architecting Secure etcd Encryption: Analyzing the Vault Kubernetes KMS v2 Beta](https://ixuvo.com/blog/vault-kubernetes-kms-v2-beta-analysis)
- [Securing AI Orchestrators: Mitigating the Langflow IDOR Vulnerability (CVE-2026-55255)](https://ixuvo.com/blog/securing-ai-orchestrators-langflow-idor-cve-2026-55255)
- [Mesh LLM Launches P2P Distributed Inference Over the iroh Networking Layer](https://ixuvo.com/blog/mesh-llm-p2p-distributed-inference-iroh)

## Research

- Research in software security, graph-based program analysis, causal reasoning, and explainable vulnerability detection.
- [CausalChain thesis implementation](https://github.com/isuvo/Thesis_Causalchain): Public repository for causal and explainable vulnerability-analysis research.
